FLASH FLOODING WAS OBSERVED OVER MUCH OF THE NORTHERN HALF OF WASHINGTON COUNTY. HIGHWAY 218 WAS CLOSED IN BOTH DIRECTIONS NEAR MILE MARKER 74 DUE TO WATER OVER THE HIGHWAY AND VEHICLES IN WATER IN DITCHES. SEVERAL OTHER COUNTY ROADS WERE CLOSED DUE TO FLOODED CREEKS FLOWING OVER THE ROAD...INCLUDING VINE AVE...GINKO AVE SOUTH OF WELLMAN...12TH STREET IN WASHINGTON...SEVERAL UNDERPASSES IN WASHINGTON...AND 170TH WEST OF RIVERSIDE RD. SOME OF THE COUNTY ROADS WERE WASHED OUT. TIME ESTIMATED.

FLASH FLOODING WAS OBSERVED ACROSS MUCH OF LEE COUNTY. A STORM SEWER COLLAPSED IN FORT MADISON. THE BASEMENT WAS FLOODED OF A RESIDENCE. THE BEGINNINGS OF A RETAINING WALL COLLAPSED ALONG MISSISSIPPI RIVER ROAD JUST SOUTH OF SANDUSKY. A MUDSLIDE OCCURRED NEAR 275TH AVE AND SANDUSKY. BELFAST ROAD WAS CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING IN SEVERAL SPOTS NEAR CROTON. TIME ESTIMATED.
HIGHWAY 16 CLOSED BETWEEN W55 AND US 218 DUE TO FLOODING OF WATER OVER THE ROAD.

COAL CREEK HAS RISEN OUT OF ITS BANKS. IT HAS FLOODED ONTO HIGHWAY 21- BARNES STREET IN WHAT CHEER. IT IS ALSO FLOODING GRIFFIN PARK AND BALL DIAMOND. A HOME IS SURROUNDED BY WATER AT LEAST 1 FOOT DEEP.

SEVERAL CITY STREETS IN CARTHAGE ARE CLOSED DUE TO WATER FLOODING THE ROADS. A PORTION OF ILLINOIS ROUTE 336 NEAR THE INTERSECTION WITH COUNTY ROAD 2500 IS CLOSED DUE TO WATER FLOWING OVER ALL FOUR LANES OF THE ROAD.
WATER IN BASEMENT. JERSEY AVE NEAR THE BRIDGE LOOKS LIKE A LAKE. TOTAL SINCE 220 PM JUNE 13 WAS 9.2 INCHES.
